## Intel tops Q2 estimates on both revenue and earnings; Q3 outlook is upbeat

Consistent corroboration across multiple outlets of an INTC top-and-bottom-line beat with an upbeat guide reduces ambiguity — this is a clean positive earnings event with broad coverage confirmation.

- INTC beat the Street on both the top and bottom lines for Q2.
- The company's Q3 guidance is characterized as upbeat.
- This cluster corroborates the beat-and-guide-up narrative across the broader INTC earnings cluster set.
- Classifier confidence is high.
